title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A CATTLE BREEDING STATION IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BALANGKAYAN, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, AND AUTHORÃÂ­IZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 127 / 65 OG No. 39, 10191 (September 29, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5456, March 27, 1969 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING A CATTLE BREEDING STATION IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BALANGKAYAN, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, AND AUTHORÃÂIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

Section 1. There is hereby established a cattle breeding station in the Municipality of Balangkayan, Province of Samar, under the supervision of the Director of Animal Industry.

SEC. 2. The Director of Animal Industry shall issue such rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry out the purposes of this Act.

SEC. 3. The sum of one hundred thousand pesos is hereby authorized to be appropriated, out of any funds in the NaÃÂtional Treasury not otherwise appropriated, for the estabÃÂlishment, operation and maintenance of said station for the fiscal year nineteen hundred sixty-seven. Thereafter, such sums as may be necessary for its operation and mainÃÂtenance shall be included in the annual General ApproÃÂpriations Act.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, March 27, 1969.
